name: Last Observation Carried Forward
description: Computes the last non-missing observed value within a partition, ordered by a time variable. The result carries forward the most recent non-missing value and is intended as input to M.Imputation.

formula.default_expression: imputed_value := LOCF(value) OVER (partition ORDER BY time_order)
formula.notes: LOCF scans backwards in time_order within each partition and returns the most recent non-missing value. If no prior non-missing value exists, the result is missing.

output_classes.description: The last non-missing value carried forward

assumptions: Time ordering within partition is unambiguous
At least one prior non-missing value exists for carry-forward to produce a result
Missing data pattern may be monotone or intermittent

input_roles.name: value
input_roles.description: Source value to carry forward (may contain missing values)

input_roles.name: partition
input_roles.description: Grouping variables defining the carry-forward scope (typically subject, parameter)

input_roles.name: time_order
input_roles.description: Variable defining the temporal ordering within partition (e.g., AVISITN, ADY)
